lines.lyrics: It's up in the clouds and it's under the floor
And you believe what you want
And it seems that you've always known it before

lines.chords: C  C/B  Am  Am/G  F  G#
lines.lyrics: It goes on forever but still they don't see
The waves of the future hit a desolate beach

lines.chords: C  C/B  Am  Am/G  F  G#
lines.lyrics: And the man with the money steps up to the mic

lines.chords: Dm  Dm/C  Bm7b5  Bbmaj7  Am7  F  G
lines.lyrics: You're not on your own, this place is our home

lines.chords: Dm  Dm/C  Bm7b5  Bbmaj7  Am7  F  G
C  G  G  C  G  C  G  G  G  C
lines.lyrics: Float through the breeze, it's all been released, follow the road

lines.chords: Bb  G  C  C/B  Eb  Eb/D

lines.lyrics: An open mind never closes the door
Now you're walking like you've been there before
And it seems that the dreams that you had
Lie silently locked in a drawer

lines.chords: Dm  Dm/C  Bm7b5  Bbmaj7  Am7  F  G
lines.lyrics: You're not on your own, this place is our home
